title: How to assign various efforts of different collaborators in a single task
excerpt: For example, collaborator A with 6 hours devoted and collaborator B with 5 hrs devoted for the same single task.

posts.author: KaPa (Kathy)
posts.cookedHtml: For example, collaborator A with 6 hours devoted and collaborator B with 5 hrs devoted for the same single task.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kathy,

Are you interested in achieving this via the workload widget?

You are able to set capacity via our new work schedule feature or via the custom option:

Screen Shot 2024-03-13 at 1.52.28 pm1157×627 56.6 KB

  • https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360010699760-The-Workload-view-and-widget

The custom option will allow you to set capacity per person on a weekly timeline - could this work for you?
